title: Advanced Netherite Medieval Weapons
description: Compatibility mod that adds Medieval Weapons items with Advanced Netherite materials
body:
## Advanced Netherite Medieval Weapons

This mod adds versions of all the weapons from the [Medieval Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/medievalweapons) mod using materials from the [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite) mod.

![An image of Netherite-Iron, Netherite-Gold, Netherite-Emerald, and Netherite-Diamond variants of all the weapons added by Medieval Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5784d5514e7497034cc48899dd803b3010f71f67.png)

These weapons all follow Advanced Netherite progression, and even have the tiered additional mob drops of Advanced Netherite swords.

![An image of the smithing recipes for the Netherite-Iron Battle Axe, Netherite-Gold Battle Axe, Netherite-Emerald Battle Axe, and the Netherite-Diamond Battle Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e375af6e8af69d15f4e14498efbd4dea2f5236f.png)

## Maintainance Info

This mod was commissioned for a minecraft server, and there are currently no plans for updating it past Fabric 1.20.1.

If you're interesting in maintaining this mod or updating it to later versions or different modloaders, reach out to me and I'll try to work something out.

## Usage

You can use this mod in modpacks and on servers freely and without permission.
